results.rendered_html: rayi m. or (rarely) f. (fr. √rā; the following forms occur in the Veda, rayis, ˚yim, ˚yibhis, ˚yīṇām; rayyā, ˚yyai, ˚yyām; cf. 2. rai), property, goods, possessions, treasure, wealth (often personified),  RV. ;  AV. ;  VS. ;  Br. ;  ŚrS. ;  ChUp.

results.rendered_html:
rayi (von rā) m., selten f.; die gewöhnlichen Formen sind rayis, rayim, rayīṇām, ein Mal rayibhis; man findet aber auch rayyā  ṚV. 10,19,7 .  VS. 12,7 .  AV. 3,14,1 . rayyai ( VS. PRĀT. 4,150 )  VS. 9,22 . 14,22 . rayyām  TS. 7,1,7,2 . Habe, Besitz, auch wohl Werthgegenstand, Kleinod: pitṛvitta  ṚV. 1,73,1 . vasumant 159,4 . bahula 3,1,19 . vīravant 2,11,13 . sarvavīra 30,11 . prajāvant 4,51,10 . gomant 5,4,11 . yuktāśva 41,5 . aśvin 8,6,9 . poṣaṃ rayīṇām 2,21,6 . tasminrayirdhruvo astu dāsvān 4,2,7 . 34,10 . iha prajāmiha rayiṃ rarāṇāḥ 36,9 . 6,6,7 . rayipatī rayīṇām 31,1 . suvīraṃ rayiṃ gṛṇate rirīhi 65,6 . rayiṃ rāsva suvīryam 8,23,12 . endo pārthivaṃ rayiṃ divyaṃ pavasva dhārayā 9,29,6 . rayibhiḥ samokasaḥ 1,64,10 .  CHĀND. UP. 5,16,1 . Stoff  PRAŚNOP. 1,4 . 9 . Als fem.  ṚV. 1,66,1 . 68,7 . 4,34,2 . enī 5,33,6 . 10,19,3 . 167,1 .  AV. 1,15,2 . 6,33,3 . 7,80,2 .  VS. 27,6 .  ŚAT. BR. 9,2,3,32 . 10,6,1,5 .  ŚĀṄKH. ŚR. 18,15,4 . — Personificirt: ayaṃ pūṣā rayirbhagaḥ somaḥ punāno arṣati  ṚV. 9,101,7 . aitu pūṣā rayirbhagaḥ svasti sarvadhātamaḥ 8,31,11 .; vgl. 10,66,10 . rayerāṅgirasasya prastobhaḥ N. eines Sāman  Ind. St. 3,231,a .
— Vgl. bṛhadrayi.
